name: Konnect
description: AI-assisted PCB design via the Model Context Protocol. Provides 185 on-demand design tools plus 6 routing and observability tools.
description_full: Konnect exposes KiCad design workflows to AI assistants via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It supports schematic editing, PCB layout and segment routing, library management, local JLCPCB catalog search, Freerouting integration, ERC/DRC, heuristic design-review audits, and manufacturing exports. The 185 design tools are organized into 18 toolsets loaded on demand; 6 routing and observability tools remain available to manage the catalog and diagnose calls.
